case_title: SGROMO, PETER A. VS FIRST AMERICAN TITLE CO.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FIRST AMERICAN TITLE CO.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY SGROMO, PETER A. AS TO DEFENDANT FIRST AMERICAN TITLE CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-16-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SGROMO, PETER A. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FIRST AMERICAN TITLE CO. NO RECOVERY PLAINTIFF FAILED TO MEET HIS BURDEN OF PROVING THAT THE CLAIMED TEX PAYMENTS ARE OWED TO HIM BY THE TITLE COMPANY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
